deploy_status.latest_commit_smoke: login page HTML confirms new chunk hashes (deploy fresh)

results.note: Login, OTP, password auth, redirect all working
Selector mismatch: test goes to /groups (deleted route), button 'Tạo nhóm mới' now on homepage /. Not an app bug — QC test maintenance needed.
Cascades from Flow 2 — no group created
Profile card, bank section, Telegram section, edit dialog, logout dialog all verified

qc1_happy_paths.blocker_assessment: Flow 2 failure is selector drift (route restructuring), not a functional regression. Core CRUD flows (auth + account) pass. No abort warranted for UAT.

round2_auth_scenarios.name: Login as Minh + home loads
round2_auth_scenarios.note: Post-login URL = /, body length = 5417. Auth redirect works correctly.

round2_auth_scenarios.name: VND dot-separator format in authenticated view
round2_auth_scenarios.note: VND format confirmed: dot-separator pattern detected in authenticated HTML. No raw 6-digit unformatted amounts.

round2_auth_scenarios.name: Bottom nav exactly 2 tabs (Nhóm + Tài khoản)
round2_auth_scenarios.note: Both Nhóm and Tài khoản tabs present. 2 nav elements found. AGENTS.md constraint satisfied.

round2_auth_scenarios.name: Groups list renders, navigate to group detail
round2_auth_scenarios.note: Group detail confirmed in isolated run (group ff8f4a71). In full run, fresh session shows 0 groups — Minh UAT seeded data is sparse. Group detail URL loads without 500/login redirect.

round2_auth_scenarios.name: Bill detail half-sheet on tap
round2_auth_scenarios.note: Skipped — Minh UAT account has no seeded bills in full run context. Needs group/bill seeding.

round2_auth_scenarios.name: Group settings debt balances view
round2_auth_scenarios.note: Skipped — cascades from R2-A4 skip in full run.

round2_auth_scenarios.name: Account page: profile + bank + Telegram sections
round2_auth_scenarios.note: All 3 sections confirmed: Profile (email), Telegram, Bank. Matches E5 account spec.

round2_auth_scenarios.name: Mobile 375px auth flow, no overflow
round2_auth_scenarios.note: Login + home loads on 375px, no horizontal overflow. Mobile regression clear.

scenarios.reason: Requires authenticated group with bill creation. Bill mở UI state (US-E3-5) cannot be reached without auth + group setup.
scenarios.playwright_coverage: Auth-gated structure confirmed (test #5); auth login confirmed R2-A1

scenarios.name: Nhắc nợ qua Telegram — 2 người pending

scenarios.playwright_coverage: Landing + desktop layout verified; group detail accessible (R2-A4)

scenarios.name: History filter theo counterparty + date range

scenarios.reason: Full Telegram → deep link → QR → bank app → confirm flow.

scenarios.name: No spam after event — 14-day silent period
scenarios.reason: 14-day soak test. Cannot accelerate time.

scenarios.reason: US-E3-2 split edit approval flagged as missing in code. Known incomplete.

key_findings.qc1_flow2_failure_root_cause: Route restructuring: /groups deleted, group creation moved to homepage /. QC test selector drift, not app regression.
